Proyecto Final Econometría

Ariadna Alonso

Mar 19

#Cargar Librerias

library(quantmod)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggcorrplot)
#Descargar datos con getSymbols

#Tickers
tickers <- c("HAL","XOM","COP","VLO","GOOGL","TSLA","BP","CVX","MSFT","AMZN")

# Rango de fechas
from_date <- "2023-01-01"
to_date   <- "2026-03-15"

# Descargar datos
getSymbols(tickers,
           src  = "yahoo",
           from = from_date,
           to   = to_date)
##  [1] "HAL"   "XOM"   "COP"   "VLO"   "GOOGL" "TSLA"  "BP"    "CVX"   "MSFT" 
## [10] "AMZN"
#Construcción de precios ajustados y rendimientos

# Precios ajustados
prices <- merge(Ad(HAL), Ad(XOM), Ad(COP), Ad(VLO), Ad(GOOGL), Ad(TSLA), Ad(BP), Ad(CVX), Ad(MSFT),Ad(AMZN))

colnames(prices) <- c("HAL", "XOM", "COP", "VLO", "GOOGL", "TSLA", "BP", "CVX", "MSFT","AMZN")

# Eliminar NA
prices <- na.omit(prices)

# Rendimientos logarítmicos
returns <- na.omit(Return.calculate(prices, method = "log"))
#head(returns)
#=============================================
#Etapa 4 - Obtención y transformacion de datos
#=============================================

# --- Matriz de correlación
corr_mat <- cor(returns)

# Ver tabla (opcional)
round(corr_mat, 3)
##         HAL    XOM   COP   VLO GOOGL  TSLA    BP   CVX   MSFT  AMZN
## HAL   1.000  0.708 0.750 0.574 0.143 0.212 0.640 0.694  0.099 0.188
## XOM   0.708  1.000 0.795 0.587 0.012 0.066 0.683 0.814 -0.028 0.037
## COP   0.750  0.795 1.000 0.617 0.105 0.146 0.694 0.778  0.069 0.144
## VLO   0.574  0.587 0.617 1.000 0.137 0.152 0.513 0.601  0.097 0.166
## GOOGL 0.143  0.012 0.105 0.137 1.000 0.381 0.104 0.098  0.448 0.557
## TSLA  0.212  0.066 0.146 0.152 0.381 1.000 0.154 0.141  0.356 0.405
## BP    0.640  0.683 0.694 0.513 0.104 0.154 1.000 0.670  0.082 0.098
## CVX   0.694  0.814 0.778 0.601 0.098 0.141 0.670 1.000  0.064 0.118
## MSFT  0.099 -0.028 0.069 0.097 0.448 0.356 0.082 0.064  1.000 0.577
## AMZN  0.188  0.037 0.144 0.166 0.557 0.405 0.098 0.118  0.577 1.000
# Heatmap de correlación
ggcorrplot(
  corr_mat,
  type = "lower",
  lab = TRUE,
  lab_size = 2.4,
  title = "Mapa de calor: correlación de rendimientos logarítmicos",
  ggtheme = ggplot2::theme_minimal()
)

#===============================
#Etapa 5 -  Modelo estimado
#===============================

#XOMt=β0+β1HALt+β2COPt+β3VLOt+β4GOOGLt+β5TSLAt+β6BPt+β7CVXt+β8MSFTt+β9AMZNt+ut

# Convertir rendimientos a data.frame (NECESARIO para lm)
df_returns <- as.data.frame(returns)

# Verificar
#head(df_returns)
#str(df_returns)

# Modelo de regresión lineal múltiple
modelo_XOM <- lm( XOM ~ HAL + COP + VLO + GOOGL + TSLA + BP + CVX + MSFT + AMZN, data = df_returns)

#summary(modelo_XOM)
#Estádisticos del data frame
summary(df_returns)
##       HAL                  XOM                  COP            
##  Min.   :-1.379e-01   Min.   :-0.0746760   Min.   :-0.1078770  
##  1st Qu.:-1.111e-02   1st Qu.:-0.0080951   1st Qu.:-0.0101937  
##  Median : 7.979e-04   Median : 0.0006415   Median : 0.0003038  
##  Mean   :-4.803e-05   Mean   : 0.0006152   Mean   : 0.0002252  
##  3rd Qu.: 1.218e-02   3rd Qu.: 0.0100000   3rd Qu.: 0.0112721  
##  Max.   : 1.362e-01   Max.   : 0.0573255   Max.   : 0.1017125  
##       VLO                 GOOGL                TSLA          
##  Min.   :-0.1562608   Min.   :-0.099924   Min.   :-0.167546  
##  1st Qu.:-0.0107588   1st Qu.:-0.008878   1st Qu.:-0.018984  
##  Median : 0.0010176   Median : 0.002173   Median : 0.001170  
##  Mean   : 0.0009389   Mean   : 0.001537   Mean   : 0.001608  
##  3rd Qu.: 0.0128314   3rd Qu.: 0.011460   3rd Qu.: 0.021723  
##  Max.   : 0.0970545   Max.   : 0.097348   Max.   : 0.204491  
##        BP                  CVX                  MSFT           
##  Min.   :-0.0992106   Min.   :-0.0858240   Min.   :-0.1052844  
##  1st Qu.:-0.0075072   1st Qu.:-0.0071467   1st Qu.:-0.0070763  
##  Median : 0.0016691   Median : 0.0010204   Median : 0.0011550  
##  Mean   : 0.0004852   Mean   : 0.0003238   Mean   : 0.0006591  
##  3rd Qu.: 0.0090382   3rd Qu.: 0.0084653   3rd Qu.: 0.0091193  
##  Max.   : 0.0802193   Max.   : 0.0643423   Max.   : 0.0965247  
##       AMZN          
##  Min.   :-0.094081  
##  1st Qu.:-0.009818  
##  Median : 0.000774  
##  Mean   : 0.001105  
##  3rd Qu.: 0.013003  
##  Max.   : 0.113124
 table.Stats(returns)
##                      HAL      XOM      COP      VLO    GOOGL     TSLA       BP
## Observations    800.0000 800.0000 800.0000 800.0000 800.0000 800.0000 800.0000
## NAs               0.0000   0.0000   0.0000   0.0000   0.0000   0.0000   0.0000

## Arithmetic Mean   0.0000   0.0006   0.0002   0.0009   0.0015   0.0016   0.0005
## Geometric Mean   -0.0003   0.0005   0.0001   0.0007   0.0014   0.0009   0.0004
## Quartile 3        0.0122   0.0100   0.0113   0.0128   0.0115   0.0217   0.0090

## NAs               0.0000   0.0000   0.0000

## Kurtosis          4.5532   6.3122   3.9736
#Incluir Series de Tiempo


library(PerformanceAnalytics)
# OJO: pasar una sola columna (XOM) y forzar plot.engine
chart.TimeSeries(returns[,"XOM"],
                 main = "Rendimientos logarítmicos diarios de XOM",
                 ylab = "Rendimiento",
                 plot.engine = "default")

#Estacionalidad x semana (Series de Tiempo)


df_returns$date <- index(returns)
df_returns$weekday <- weekdays(df_returns$date)

aggregate(XOM ~ weekday, data = df_returns, mean)
##     weekday           XOM
## 1    Friday  0.0010871221
## 2    Monday  0.0011370051
## 3  Thursday  0.0016162165
## 4   Tuesday -0.0003622943
## 5 Wednesday -0.0003147968
#Estacionalidad Mensual (Series de Tiempo)

df_returns$month <- format(df_returns$date, "%m")
aggregate(XOM ~ month, data = df_returns, mean)
##    month           XOM
## 1     01  0.0033464804
## 2     02  0.0014516565
## 3     03  0.0026148394
## 4     04 -0.0004048774
## 5     05 -0.0024851912
## 6     06  0.0013729328
## 7     07  0.0010094598
## 8     08  0.0012057542
## 9     09  0.0005932635
## 10    10 -0.0013923281
## 11    11  0.0003296016
## 12    12 -0.0013018164
#Grafico

boxplot(XOM ~ month,
        data = df_returns,
        main = "Rendimientos de XOM por mes",
        ylab = "Rendimiento",
        las = 2)

#Revisar Estadísticos
#class(modelo_XOM)
#summary(modelo_XOM)$coefficients

#library(knitr)
#kable(summary(modelo_XOM)$coefficients, digits = 4)

summary(modelo_XOM)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = XOM ~ HAL + COP + VLO + GOOGL + TSLA + BP + CVX + 
##     MSFT + AMZN, data = df_returns)
## 
## Residuals:
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -0.0280677 -0.0040140  0.0001539  0.0044669  0.0214117 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.0004780  0.0002552   1.873   0.0614 .  
## HAL          0.0839025  0.0182006   4.610 4.70e-06 ***
## COP          0.2227834  0.0263208   8.464  < 2e-16 ***
## VLO          0.0359178  0.0159038   2.258   0.0242 *  
## GOOGL       -0.0316463  0.0168797  -1.875   0.0612 .  
## TSLA        -0.0163838  0.0078822  -2.079   0.0380 *  
## BP           0.1081963  0.0231879   4.666 3.61e-06 ***
## CVX          0.4172735  0.0308021  13.547  < 2e-16 ***
## MSFT        -0.0514929  0.0210819  -2.443   0.0148 *  
## AMZN        -0.0192722  0.0174389  -1.105   0.2694    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.007179 on 790 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.7593, Adjusted R-squared:  0.7565 
## F-statistic: 276.8 on 9 and 790 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
# =========================
# ETAPA 6 – Diagnóstico
# =========================

library(lmtest)
library(car)

# 1. Autocorrelación
dwtest(modelo_XOM)
## 
##  Durbin-Watson test
## 
## data:  modelo_XOM
## DW = 1.9897, p-value = 0.4396
## alternative hypothesis: true autocorrelation is greater than 0
# 2. Heterocedasticidad
bptest(modelo_XOM)
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  modelo_XOM
## BP = 8.1426, df = 9, p-value = 0.5198
# 3. Multicolinealidad
vif(modelo_XOM)
##      HAL      COP      VLO    GOOGL     TSLA       BP      CVX     MSFT 
## 2.667913 3.588756 1.783484 1.555300 1.301191 2.205688 2.988570 1.587693 
##     AMZN 
## 1.892049
# =========================
# ETAPA 7 – Pronostico
# =========================
#Obtener valores ajustados (in-sample forecast)

# Valores ajustados del modelo
fitted_XOM <- fitted(modelo_XOM)

# Comparar con valores reales
head(cbind(
  XOM_real = df_returns$XOM,
  XOM_ajustado = fitted_XOM
))
##                XOM_real XOM_ajustado
## 2023-01-04  0.002906295 -0.001684185
## 2023-01-05  0.022127500  0.021290721
## 2023-01-06  0.012014304  0.009003138
## 2023-01-09 -0.018813450 -0.004681631
## 2023-01-10  0.014824569  0.005155520
## 2023-01-11  0.011559794 -0.004399638
#Visualizacion

plot(df_returns$XOM, type = "l", col = "black",
     main = "XOM real vs XOM ajustado",
     ylab = "Rendimiento", xlab = "Tiempo")

lines(fitted_XOM, col = "blue", lwd = 2)

legend("topright",
       legend = c("XOM real", "XOM ajustado"),
       col = c("black", "blue"),
       lty = 1)

# =========================
#Etapa 8 GARCH - Puntos extra
# =========================
# install.packages("rugarch")
library(rugarch)


# Especificación GARCH(1,1)
spec_garch <- ugarchspec(
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1,1)),
  mean.model     = list(armaOrder = c(0,0), include.mean = TRUE),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)
garch_XOM <- ugarchfit(
  spec = spec_garch,
  data = df_returns$XOM)

show(garch_XOM)  
## 
## *---------------------------------*
## *          GARCH Model Fit        *
## *---------------------------------*
## 
## Conditional Variance Dynamics    
## -----------------------------------
## GARCH Model  : sGARCH(1,1)
## Mean Model   : ARFIMA(0,0,0)
## Distribution : norm 
## 
## Optimal Parameters
## ------------------------------------
##         Estimate  Std. Error  t value Pr(>|t|)
## mu      0.000563    0.000489   1.1521  0.24927
## omega   0.000010    0.000000  31.9510  0.00000
## alpha1  0.047969    0.004647  10.3219  0.00000
## beta1   0.903975    0.009486  95.2966  0.00000
## 
## Robust Standard Errors:
##         Estimate  Std. Error  t value Pr(>|t|)
## mu      0.000563    0.000458   1.2314  0.21817
## omega   0.000010    0.000000  24.2816  0.00000
## alpha1  0.047969    0.003299  14.5424  0.00000
## beta1   0.903975    0.007388 122.3521  0.00000
## 
## LogLikelihood : 2265.038 
## 
## Information Criteria
## ------------------------------------
##                     
## Akaike       -5.6526
## Bayes        -5.6292
## Shibata      -5.6526
## Hannan-Quinn -5.6436
## 
## Weighted Ljung-Box Test on Standardized Residuals
## ------------------------------------
##                         statistic p-value
## Lag[1]                     0.4080  0.5230
## Lag[2*(p+q)+(p+q)-1][2]    0.6961  0.6083
## Lag[4*(p+q)+(p+q)-1][5]    1.0168  0.8559
## d.o.f=0
## H0 : No serial correlation
## 
## Weighted Ljung-Box Test on Standardized Squared Residuals
## ------------------------------------
##                         statistic p-value
## Lag[1]                      6.522 0.01066
## Lag[2*(p+q)+(p+q)-1][5]     8.235 0.02576
## Lag[4*(p+q)+(p+q)-1][9]    11.170 0.02788
## d.o.f=2
## 
## Weighted ARCH LM Tests
## ------------------------------------
##             Statistic Shape Scale P-Value
## ARCH Lag[3]   0.04199 0.500 2.000  0.8376
## ARCH Lag[5]   3.19069 1.440 1.667  0.2633
## ARCH Lag[7]   4.88718 2.315 1.543  0.2362
## 
## Nyblom stability test
## ------------------------------------
## Joint Statistic:  42.8691
## Individual Statistics:              
## mu     0.09323
## omega  4.58143
## alpha1 0.09779
## beta1  0.13942
## 
## Asymptotic Critical Values (10% 5% 1%)
## Joint Statistic:          1.07 1.24 1.6
## Individual Statistic:     0.35 0.47 0.75
## 
## Sign Bias Test
## ------------------------------------
##                    t-value    prob sig
## Sign Bias            1.575 0.11567    
## Negative Sign Bias   2.174 0.02999  **
## Positive Sign Bias   1.616 0.10648    
## Joint Effect         7.828 0.04971  **
## 
## 
## Adjusted Pearson Goodness-of-Fit Test:
## ------------------------------------
##   group statistic p-value(g-1)
## 1    20     19.05       0.4536
## 2    30     24.10       0.7240
## 3    40     39.80       0.4343
## 4    50     45.75       0.6057
## 
## 
## Elapsed time : 0.5359399
